footer.description: A simple agenda to discover salsa and bachata events, socials, and academies in Guatemala.

home.eyebrow: Salsa and bachata agenda in Guatemala
home.title: Find where to dance this week
home.heroSubtitle: Events, venues, and academies for salsa and bachata in Guatemala. All in one place.
home.submitDescription: Publish your event, academy or venue in minutes. More people will find it.
home.quote: Guatemala dances better when information is easier to find.

localPanel.title: Made for the local scene
localPanel.description: From Zona 10 to Antigua, the goal is to quickly see what is happening and who to contact.

localStrip.title: A clear agenda based on how the community already shares flyers
localStrip.description: Date, venue, cover, and price. Only what matters to decide quickly.

events.title: Salsa and bachata events
events.description: Explore upcoming parties, socials, workshops, and gatherings in Guatemala.
events.empty: There are no events matching the current filters.

spots.title: Dance spots
spots.description: Bars, restaurants, and venues with regular salsa and bachata nights.
spots.empty: There are no spots available right now.

academies.title: Academies and teachers
academies.description: Explore established academies and teachers to learn salsa, bachata, and other Latin rhythms.
academies.emptyDescription: Do you run a dance academy? Contact us and we'll add it for free.

academies.title: Schools and spaces for structured learning
academies.description: Find academies with schedules, levels, and direct contact for recurring classes or more complete programs.

teachers.title: Teachers for more flexible classes
teachers.description: Discover teachers focused on private lessons, bootcamps, and more personalized formats without depending on a fixed academy.

academies.description: If you are looking for fixed schedules, level-based programs, or a more stable community, the academy view is still the best starting point.

teachers.description: If you prefer a more personalized experience, you can browse teachers for private classes, skill refreshers, or one-off workshops.

academies.trialClassYes: Yes, they offer a trial class

teachers.label: Teacher
teachers.empty: There are no featured teachers yet.
teachers.emptyDescription: Once we start adding them, this is where you'll be able to discover teachers by name, city, or class format.

search.pageDescription: Find events, spots, academies, and teachers by name, city, or dance style.
search.placeholder: Search events, academies, teachers, or spots
search.idleDescription: Search by name, city, venue, or style. For example: salsa, Antigua, Jose Medina, or bachata.
search.emptyDescription: We couldn't find results for "{query}". Try another name, city, or style.

submitEvent.title: Submit an event
submitEvent.description: Complete the form and we will review the information before publishing it.
submitEvent.error: The form could not be submitted.
